en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization has an External Prevention Service (SPA) in the Spain Occupational Risk Prevention Services Applicability Assessment.
Spain Occupational Risk Prevention Services - External Prevention Service

Employers are required to assess and prevent workplace risks and to implement preventive measures to protect workers’ health and safety. Law 31 Royal Decree 39 Royal Decree 171 Proof of payment would usually be available from your Finance Department, or whomever in your organization is responsible for making payments to your suppliers.
